export async function sendTelegramText(bot, chatId, text, runtime, opts) {
	const htmlText = (opts?.textMode ?? "markdown") === "html" ? text : markdownToTelegramHtml(text);
	try {
		return await bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, htmlText, {
			parse_mode: "HTML",
			...(opts?.replyMarkup ? { reply_markup: opts.replyMarkup } : {}),
		});
	} catch (err) {
		throw err;
	}
}
